question: What are the names of high schoolers who have 3 or more friends?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  3
predicted_sql: SELECT nm FROM highschooler JOIN friend ON highschooler.id = friend.stud_id GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
raw_response: SELECT nm FROM highschooler JOIN friend ON highschooler.id = friend.stud_id GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
